title: ranunculus sulphureus subsp. sulphureus
intro: Ranunculus sulphureus subsp. sulphureus, also known as Yellow Water Buttercup, is a species of flowering plant in the buttercup family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to its alkaloid content. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Ranunculus sulphureus subsp. sulphureus, such as infusions or decoctions, have been used to treat various ailments, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
